name: Maya Chen
bio: Maya and I met in our university design lab and still swap notes on books, coffee spots, and side projects.

name: Jordan Alvarez
bio: Jordan was my first team lead at a startup and always sends brutally helpful advice when work gets messy.

name: Amina Rahman
bio: Amina is my cousin and the person I plan spontaneous food trips and holiday itineraries with.

name: Leo Martinez
bio: Leo is my climbing partner, accountability buddy, and the first person I call when I need an honest reset.

name: Priya Sen
bio: Priya lives two blocks away and somehow knows every new cafe, pop-up market, and neighborhood story.

name: Daniel Kim
bio: Daniel used to manage me and still checks in about long-term career moves, not just the next job title.

name: Sara Ahmed
bio: Sara and I met while organizing a local literacy drive, and we still brainstorm community ideas over voice notes.

name: Ethan Brooks
bio: Ethan moved abroad for music production, so our check-ins are usually voice calls about albums, gigs, and family life.

name: Nadia Hassan
bio: Nadia is a former teammate who still sends thoughtful feedback on product ideas and always remembers to check in after big launches.

name: Omar Faruq
bio: Omar has been a close friend since school days, and we usually reconnect through match discussions, family updates, and late-night calls.
